title: Thelypteris laevigata
taxonomy: Thelypteris laevigata is classified within the family Thelypteridaceae. This species belongs to the genus Thelypteris, which is a group of ferns. It is a member of the order Polypodiales, a large and diverse order of ferns. Within the Polypodiales order, Thelypteris laevigata is further classified as a member of the suborder Aspleniineae. Thelypteris laevigata is native to Central and South America, where it is commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions.

intro: Thelypteris laevigata, also known as the smooth shield fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae.
